title: Hammers 3x3! [NEO/FORGE/FABRIC]
description: Why settle for pickaxes when you can smash through blocks with hammers like a boss!
body:
Hammers Extension!

A vanilla-friendly mod that adds powerful hammer tools to Minecraft, allowing you to mine blocks in efficient 3x3x1 or 5x5x1 patterns!


Normal Hammers feature 10% more durability than pickaxes, though slightly slower. Perfect for extensive mining!

Enhanced Hammers take it up a notch with 30% more durability and faster mining speed. The catch? They require Enhanced Sticks and other rare materials for crafting.

The enchantment SEISMIC SHIFT to upgrade your hammer to 5x5x1!

Explore new crafting recipes below or use JEI for guidance. Dive into a new level of mining efficiency with Hammers Extension!

If you wish to use this in a modpack, feel free to do so!
